overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain vista at sunset. The character remains stationary throughout the clip, observing the snow-capped peak and lake below while birds occasionally fly across the dramatic golden-hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook with mountain vista

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the mountain

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on the cliff edge, gazing toward the snow-capped mountain while holding a weapon in the right hand, with cloak fluttering in the wind

entered.detail: large mountain peak with snow-covered summit dominating the horizon, backlit by golden sun
calm body of water visible in the valley below, reflecting the warm sunset light
stone ledge where the character stands, with rough textured surface
vertical wooden structure or marker on the left side of the frame
dense tree canopy covering the lower slopes between the cliff and the mountain

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff overlooking a breathtaking mountain vista during golden hour. The snow-capped peak dominates the distant horizon while a calm lake sits in the valley below. Sparse clouds drift across the warm sky as birds occasionally fly overhead, and the character's cloak moves gently in the breeze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze over a vast mountain vista as the golden hour light deepens across the landscape. It begins with a hooded character standing motionless on a rocky cliff, overlooking a distant snow-capped peak and a calm lake nestled in the valley below. As the camera lingers, sparse clouds drift across the warm sky while birds glide through the air, adding a sense of scale to the horizon. The scene then emphasizes the subtle movement of the environment, with the character's cloak fluttering gently in the breeze against the backdrop of the glowing peaks.
